skills.name: content-editing
skills.description: Use when updating marketing copy, markdown or MDX content, frontmatter, structured content objects, or other user-facing content sources. Keeps edits aligned with the existing content model and rendering pipeline.

skills.name: conventional-commit
skills.description: Prompt and workflow for generating conventional commit messages using a structured XML format. Guides users to create standardized, descriptive commit messages in line with the Conventional Commits specification, including instructions, examples, and validation.

skills.name: figma-to-code
skills.description: Use when given a Figma URL and asked to make a component or section match the Figma design. Covers fetching Figma data, mapping design tokens to Tailwind/CSS, and updating component code.

skills.name: implementation-planning
skills.description: Use when the user explicitly asks for a plan, roadmap, phased implementation, or task breakdown. Produces a plan only; it does not implement code changes.

skills.name: shadcn
skills.description: Manages shadcn components and projects — adding, searching, fixing, debugging, styling, and composing UI. Provides project context, component docs, and usage examples. Applies when working with shadcn/ui, component registries, presets, --preset codes, or any project with a components.json file. Also triggers for "shadcn init", "create an app with --preset", or "switch to --preset".

skills.name: webapp-testing
skills.description: Toolkit for interacting with and testing local web applications using Playwright. Supports verifying frontend functionality, debugging UI behavior, capturing browser screenshots, and viewing browser logs.
